item.description:
George Tsilfidis @GeorgeTsilfidis · 4min This was one of the funnest pieces of content we did
Worthwhile to check out Cita Forward Progress @FwdProgressHQ · 1h ICYMI:
@robpizzola, @GeorgeTsilfidis, @amock419 & @Clevta did the official Forward Progress NFL Mock Draft!
Seven Trades went down in this one!
Presented by: @FDSportsbook #FDPartner

item.title: JABergman: Around The NFL reposteó Jeremy Bergman @JABergman · 7min Titans GM Mike Borgonzi: "There's a cluster of players up there
item.description: Around The NFL reposteó Jeremy Bergman @JABergman · 7min Titans GM Mike Borgonzi: "There's a cluster of players up there that we really like. In particular, Jeremiyah (Love), I think he's a special player. ... It's also a group of edge guys up there that are really good, too. We'll have some really good options up there at 4." Cita Jim Wyatt @jwyattsports · 15min First question to @Titans GM Mike Borgonzi is about RB Jeremiyah Love and the potential to take him at 4. 1 2 3 3 mil

item.title: ESPNPR: Adam Schefter reposteó ESPN PR @ESPNPR · 16min Meet the commentator team for ESPN's presentation of the '26 #NFLDraft on
